project.name: Agentic QA Release Gate
project.purpose: A small .NET 8 API used to practise CI, automated testing, pull-request workflows, and agent-driven development.
project.architecture: ASP.NET Core minimal API with an in-memory singleton service and MSTest test project

entryPoints.responsibility: Defines HTTP endpoints and maps service outcomes or exceptions to HTTP responses.

areas.name: Quality Map pull-request automation
flow: PR lifecycle event or PR comment
Current-head bot response validation or blocked status
Owner-only map refresh request for safe same-repository PRs
knownRisks: A stale response must not pass the current PR head.
Duplicate lifecycle events must not request duplicate analyses for the same head.
Privileged workflows must not execute pull-request-controlled code.
Refresh requests must not target forks or unsupported branches.

areas.name: Order creation
flow: Order persisted in the in-memory order store
knownRisks: Input validation changes can alter HTTP 400 versus HTTP 201 behavior.
Normalization rules can change the persisted customer name.
The singleton in-memory store can leak state between API tests if test isolation is weak.

areas.name: Order status transitions
knownRisks: A transition-rule change can permit impossible business states.
Unknown status text and invalid recognized transitions must remain distinguishable in implementation while both return HTTP 400.
Missing orders must continue returning HTTP 404.
